label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this square dance problem. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a partner at the start. The question is about tracking their partner swaps through several steps and figuring out who Bob ends up with at the end. Let me take it step by step. First, I need to list out the initial pairings. The problem says: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga So initially, the partners are: Alice - Lola Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Sam Eve - Helga Now, the problem says there are several partner swaps. Let me go through each one in order. First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So, Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After switching, Dave would be with Lola, and Alice would be with Sam. So after first swap: Alice - Sam (previously Dave's partner) Dave - Lola (previously Alice's partner) Others remain the same: Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Eve - Helga Second swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve is currently with Helga, and Alice is with Sam. After swapping, Eve will take Alice's partner (Sam), and Alice will take Eve's partner (Helga). So after second swap: Alice - Helga Eve - Sam Others: Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Lola Third swap: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob is currently with Karl, Dave is with Lola. After swapping: Bob - Lola Dave - Karl Others: Alice - Helga Claire - Patrick Eve - Sam Fourth swap: Bob and Eve switch partners. Bob is
